questions.question: Which is the largest continent in the world by land area?
questions.explanation: Asia is the largest continent in terms of land area and population.

questions.question: Who is known as the Father of the Indian Constitution?
questions.explanation: Dr. B. R. Ambedkar was the Chairman of the Drafting Committee of the Indian Constitution.

questions.question: Which river is the longest in India?
questions.explanation: The Ganga (Ganges) is the longest river in India.

questions.question: Which country is home to the Great Barrier Reef?
questions.explanation: The Great Barrier Reef is located off the coast of Queensland, Australia.

questions.question: Which Indian state is known as the 'Land of Five Rivers'?
questions.explanation: Punjab is called the 'Land of Five Rivers' because the word Punjab means five waters.

questions.question: Who was the first woman Prime Minister of India?
questions.explanation: Indira Gandhi became the first woman Prime Minister of India in 1966.

questions.question: Which planet is the largest in our Solar System?
questions.explanation: Jupiter is the largest planet in the Solar System.

questions.question: In which year did India gain independence?
Which is the highest civilian award in India?
questions.explanation: Bharat Ratna is the highest civilian award in India.

questions.question: Which ocean is the largest in the world?
questions.explanation: The Pacific Ocean is the largest and deepest ocean on Earth.
